title: Update ARCHITECTURE.md to reflect current implementation
description: Fix 7 ARCHITECTURE.md discrepancies: (1) Line 9: update ~400 lines to ~970 lines; (2) Line 147: document {output, exitCode} return type with 0/1/2 codes instead of "not currently implemented"; (3) Lines 207-212: move 5 implemented features (glob, env vars, cmd substitution, redirection, bg jobs) from Future Enhancements to documented sections; (4) Lines 221-228: remove trailing auto-merged CR text; (5) Document pipe error short-circuit behavior; (6) Document readOnly read from fs.readOnly; (7) Update Future Enhancements to only list genuinely unimplemented features. This resolves 7 test failures and 3 major vision gaps.
